position_news.summary: Kotak Mahindra Bank Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates |SUBJECT: General Updates
HDFC Bank Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Intimation under SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015'. |SUBJECT: Updates

recent_announcements.summary: SWELECT Energy Systems Limited has successfully commissioned 4.40 MW Solar Power plant on 03rd July, 2026 at V. Muthulingapuram Village, Virudhunagar Taluk, Virudhunagar District, Tamil Nadu, connecting to 33/11KV Naranapuram SS at 33 KV level. |SUBJECT: Updates

SAHAJSOLAR: Sahaj Solar Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Appointment of M/s. Mayur Chhaganbhai Undhad and Co. as Cost Auditor of the company for FY 2026-27 w.e.f. July 04, 2026. |SUBJECT: Appointment
